description_long: This is a rectangular pillow with a visually striking pattern of alternating vertical stripes in dark blue and black. The surface texture appears to be woven fabric, giving it a slightly textured, matte finish. The pillow is moderately plump, with slightly pointed corners and a soft, compressible appearance, suggesting it is filled with a lightweight material such as polyester fiber or down. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel to the longer edge of the pillow, creating a bold, modern look. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on any side of the pillow. The overall condition of the pillow is pristine, with no visible stains, marks, or signs of wear.
description: A rectangular pillow with bold vertical dark blue and black stripes and a woven, matte fabric texture. The pillow appears soft, plump, and in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full striped pattern with slightly pointed corners and a plump, rectangular shape.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge of the pillow, emphasizing its thickness and the continuity of the vertical stripes.
description_view_2: Back view nearly identical to the front, with the same striped pattern and overall shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's thickness and the vertical alignment of the stripes.
